reason: R12 stories can start from disease, policy, AI, IP, or commodity news, but OP/EPS/FCF and OPM conversion decide stage promotion.
Repeat revenue, repeat contract, export channel, regulated distribution, licensing, FDA/regulatory scope, and subscriptions matter more than theme labels.
Farm income, dealer inventory, feed cost, CAC, churn, IP diversification, fuel cost, and price pass-through determine durability.
IPO pops and event rallies validate Stage 1/2 price-path, but they often need 4B-watch.
Public-health regulation, legal settlement, policy reversal, AI substitution, disease normalization, and low disclosure confidence cap unsafe Green.
Smart farm, education, IP, and regulated-consumer names need debt, cash-runway, inventory, and receivables checks.
R12 event stories often price narrative before FCF, so valuation room is small and 4B has to be explicit.
